title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_cherry_pick
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_cherry_pick' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into MCP roots; ignored if workspaceRoot set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP roots.

sources.description: Sources: SHA, `A..B` range, or branch name (resolves to `onto..<branch>`).

onto.description: Destination branch. Defaults to the currently checked-out branch.

deleteMergedBranches.description: Delete branch-kind sources locally after success. Protected names and remote refs unaffected.

deleteMergedWorktrees.description: Remove local worktrees on branch-kind sources after success. Protected tails skipped.

strictMergedRefEquality.description: false (default): delete branch when every commit is content-equivalent on destination (patch-id, normal cherry-pick outcome). true: require strict ref ancestry (`git branch -d` semantics — will refuse after cherry-pick due to SHA mismatch).
